name: Neon Ws Proxy
tagline: The database you love, on a serverless platform designed to help you build reliable and scalable applications faster.
description:
The database you love, on a serverless platform designed to help you build reliable and scalable applications faster.

Docs: https://neon.tech?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  neon-proxy:
    image: ghcr.io/neondatabase/wsproxy:latest
    environment:
      - APPEND_PORT=postgres:5432
      - ALLOW_ADDR_REGEX=.*
      - LOG_TRAFFIC=false
      - LOG_CONN_INFO=true
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - nc -z 127.0.0.1 80
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 20
    ports:
      - 42070:80
  postgres:
    image: postgres:17-alpine
    volumes:
      - postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u93ae56fe05
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=79f507db4c46bfa03e5e919f52224b69
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-postgres}
      - POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=password
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv31d130e7} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-neon_ws_proxy}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  postgresql-data: null
